reapack.name: Interactive-TC-Display
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by c. Overview of the 'TimeCode' field depending on the context.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: TimeShift
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by Github Copilot. Precise Shifting of Items/Timeselection/CursPos.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: CreateTracksFromText
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by Github Copilot. Create Tracks from a formatted text.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: View-Item-Metadatas
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by Github Copilot. View item's metadatas.
reapack.author: Mariow

reapack.name: Swap-ItemsPositionsOnSameTracks
reapack.description: Concept by Mariow. Coding assistance by Github Copilot. Swap the positions of two items.
reapack.author: Mariow
